canonical_url_bind_test_cases.name: sakwa_real_date_not_17_jul
canonical_url_bind_test_cases.reason: Sakwa's real New Order full-length episode was uploaded 2026-05-17T06:30:06Z (video_id BS9TmtR_Ehw, ~28min). A Short of that episode (T5Bg1fRYchU, 65s) uploaded 2026-07-17 must NEVER create a phantom Sakwa production dated 17 Jul.

canonical_url_bind_test_cases.name: short_does_not_inherit_date
canonical_url_bind_test_cases.reason: A Sakwa Short uploaded 2026-07-17 referencing the old May Sakwa episode must not override the parent's canonical May date, must not create a new row, and its views must attach to the parent via URL_BIND (short_clip_views bucket in fetch_youtube_data), NOT to any new row and NOT to another guest's row.

canonical_url_bind_test_cases.name: cross_production_metric_isolation
canonical_url_bind_test_cases.reason: Two independent productions: Perkins full episode (video_id PERKINSFULL12) with high X views, and a Sakwa full episode (BS9TmtR_Ehw). Perkins's x_views MUST NOT be inherited by Sakwa's row and vice versa. Canonical dedupe is keyed by canonical_video_id — different video_ids = different canonicals = metrics kept isolated.
